grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2023) 27:192 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-023-01532-3 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Evaluation of real‑time kinematic positioning performance of the BDS‑3 PPP service on B2b signal Peida Wu1 · Yidong Lou1 · Weixing Zhang1 · Jan Dousa2 · Huizhong He4,5 · Junbing Chai3 · Yongzhong Ouyang4,5 · Zhenyi Zhang1 · Xu Zou1 Received: 6 March 2023 / Accepted: 10 August 2023 / Published

Although GNSS community has conducted many evaluations on the PPP-B2b products and its user performance, comprehensive evaluations of real-time PPP solutions using the BDS-3 PPP service at kinematic and highly kinematic platforms are still absent.
